failure.message: assert 200 in (401, 403) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:75: in test_me_without_token assert r.status_code in (401, 403) E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_normalized_order_pydantic

failure.message: ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes.

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:1063: in test_normalized_order_pydantic from brokers.schemas import NormalizedOrder, OrderStatus backend/brokers/__init__.py:15: in <module> _FERNET = Fernet(os.environ["ENCRYPTION_KEY"].encode()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cryptography/fernet.py:41: in __init__ raise ValueError( E ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes.

testcase.name: test_audit_indexes_exist

failure.message: KeyError: 'MONGO_URL'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:1557: in test_audit_indexes_exist info = asyncio.run(_check()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:190: in run return runner.run(main) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/backend_test.py:1550: in _check client = AsyncIOMotorClient(_os.environ["MONGO_URL"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen os>:679: in __getitem__ ??? E KeyError: 'MONGO_URL'

testcase.name: test_reconciler_tick_no_live_brokers_returns_zero

failure.message:
AssertionError: stdout= stderr=Traceback (most recent call last): File "<string>", line 4, in <module> File "/app/backend/services/reconciler_loop.py", line 13, in <module> from brokers import decrypt_credentials File "/app/backend/brokers/__init__.py", line 15, in <module> _FERNET = Fernet(os.environ["ENCRYPTION_KEY"].encode()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cryptography/fernet.py", line 41, in __init__ raise ValueError( ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes.
assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['/root/.venv/bin/python', '-c', "import asyncio, os, sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app/backend')
f....py", line 41, in __init__
 raise ValueError(
ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes.
').returncode

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/backend_test.py:1917: in test_reconciler_tick_no_live_brokers_returns_zero assert proc.returncode == 0, f"stdout={proc.stdout}
stderr={proc.stderr}" E AssertionError: stdout= E stderr=Traceback (most recent call last): E File "<string>", line 4, in <module> E File "/app/backend/services/reconciler_loop.py", line 13, in <module> E from brokers import decrypt_credentials E File "/app/backend/brokers/__init__.py", line 15, in <module> E _FERNET = Fernet(os.environ["ENCRYPTION_KEY"].encode()) E ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E File "/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cryptography/fernet.py", line 41, in __init__ E raise ValueError( E ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes. E E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['/root/.venv/bin/python', '-c', "import asyncio, os, sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/app/backend')
f....py", line 41, in __init__
 raise ValueError(
ValueError: Fernet key must be 32 url-safe base64-encoded bytes.
').returncode

testcase.name: test_kill_switch_toggle_emits_alert_log

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected >=2 KILL_SWITCH log rows after toggle, got 0: [] assert 0 >= 2 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_alerts_iter11.py:174: in test_kill_switch_toggle_emits_alert_log assert len(ks_rows) >= 2, f"Expected >=2 KILL_SWITCH log rows after toggle, got {len(ks_rows)}: {new_rows}" E AssertionError: Expected >=2 KILL_SWITCH log rows after toggle, got 0: [] E assert 0 >= 2 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_brokers_list_shape
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_brokers_iter12.py:87: in test_brokers_list_shape assert set(caps.keys()) == CAPS_KEYS, f"{it['name']} caps={caps}" E AssertionError: zerodha caps={'supports_modify': True, 'supports_amo': True, 'supports_iceberg': True, 'supports_basket_native': True, 'supports_postback_ws': True, 'supports_options': True, 'supports_options_multi_leg': True, 'max_qty_per_order': None, 'min_qty_per_order': 1} E assert {'max_qty_per..._modify', ...} == {'supports_am...lti_leg', ...} E E Extra items in the left set: E 'min_qty_per_order' E 'max_qty_per_order' E Use -v to get more diff
